title: Jade Modded Entities
description: An addon mod for Jade that expands to modded entities highlighting relevant information
body:
# Jade Modded Entities

A mod that adds support for displaying information from Jade on entities added by other mods.

## Supported Mods
- [SWEM](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/swem) (1.20.1, Forge/NeoForge)
- Villager breeding cooldowns (All game versions, all loaders)
- [Doggy Talents Next](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/doggy-talents-next) (Only Fabric 1.21.11 is missing)

## Wiki

Check out the [wiki](https://github.com/magnushjensen/jade-modded-entities/wiki) for detailed documentation.

If you think anything is missing from the wiki that is unclear, send a message in the discord or open an [improve documentation issue](https://github.com/MagnusHJensen/jade-modded-entities/issues/new?template=3.Improve_docs.md).

## Roadmap

Check out the version [milestones](https://github.com/MagnusHJensen/jade-modded-entities/milestones)

## Links

Join my [Discord](https://discord.gg/PHu8k32M3q) for support and updates! (Just created, so barebones)
- [CurseForge page](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/jade-modded-entities)
- [Modrinth page](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade-modded-entities)

## Thanks to

- [Snownee](https://github.com/Snownee) for creating [Jade](https://github.com/Snownee/Jade)
- [jaredlll08](https://github.com/jaredlll08) for creating [`Multiloader-Template`](https://github.com/jaredlll08/MultiLoader-Template)
